word: G4594 - σήμερον - sḗmeron - say'-mer-on - This day

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
இன்று, இன்றைய தினம், இன்னாள் - வினை யடை

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter (as adverb) of a presumed compound of the article G3588 (“tau” changed to “sigma”) and G2250; on the (that is, this) day (or night current or just passed); genitively now (that is, at present, hitherto): - this (to-) day.
